ddls:
CREATE TABLE "restaurants" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restaurant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the restaurant */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the restaurant's review page */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the restaurant */,
  "cuisine_type" TEXT /* Type of cuisine served by the restaurant */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening and closing times of the restaurant */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range of the restaurant */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the restaurant */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the restaurant's social media profiles */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the restaurant */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the restaurant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the restaurant */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the restaurant */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the restaurant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "review_rating" REAL /* Rating given in the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "review_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "review_dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  "review_images" TEXT /* Links to images uploaded with the review */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular user, reviewer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Link to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Italian, Mexican) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "category_image" TEXT /* Link to an image representing the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restaurant_categories" (
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the restaurant */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restaurant_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the restaurant */,
  "restaurant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restaurant being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the restaurant data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, search) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "is_mobile" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was from a mobile device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_restaurant_id FOREIGN KEY ("restaurant_id") REFERENCES restaurants ("restaurant_id")
)
